differences: Added office and field mode controls to the global header.
Changed the AI assistant from passive shortcuts to four proactive recommendations.
Added a field upload center covering classification, summaries, and approvals.
Preserved the approved dark three-column dashboard system.
suggestions: Use the field-mode state as a shared context for the Project screen.
Reuse upload-status and AI-insight components in task detail panels.
reasoning: Dashboard v1.0 communicates FillWork's unique combination of document work, field operations, photo evidence, and proactive AI without reverting to a generic admin analytics layout.
